name: Savory Dressing Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepot, bring 4 cups of water to a boil over moderate heat.
2. Add the turkey giblets and reduce the heat. Simmer until no more scum rises; skim well.
3. Stir in salt, pepper, celery, carrots, onion, thyme, bay leaf, and rosemary. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Remove the liver to a covered bowl and chill. Return the pot to low heat and simmer for an additional 60 minutes. Remove the giblets and set aside.
5. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container; discard solids.
6. Add the chilled liver, broth, remaining thyme, parsley, lemon zest, pepper, marjoram, eggs, and breadcrumbs to the food processor. Pulse until just mixed.
7. Divide the mixture into equal portions and form each into a ball.
8. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Brown the balls on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
9. Transfer the balls to an ungreased baking pan and bake at 325°F for 25-30 minutes until fully cooked. Serve hot with gravy.
